title: scale & rotate
description: translate, rotate, and scale are now individual CSS properties, separate from the transform shorthand. They stack independently — adding scale on hover no longer wipes out a rotate applied elsewhere. Baseline widely available since 2022.
html:
Old way

Hover — the tilt disappears when scale kicks in.

transform: scale() overwrites transform: rotate()
New way

Hover — the tilt stays while the card grows.

scale and rotate are independent
challenge: The right card uses the individual rotate property for its tilt. Add scale: 1.08 to .modern:hover so it grows on hover while keeping the rotation — something the old transform shorthand can't do.
realWorldUsage: Interactive cards and gallery items that have a decorative tilt and need a scale-on-hover effect, independent rotate and translate animations on the same element, and any case where you want to transition only one transform dimension without affecting the others — previously required transform lists in the shorthand or JavaScript.
